title: Runtime context badge colours — metaMe changed to emerald
body:
RuntimeTakeoverBanner now uses two context-driven colour overrides instead of LLM-theme colours:

KNYT context   → amber glass   (border-amber-500/30, bg-amber-950/30, text-amber-300)
metaMe context → emerald glass (border-emerald-500/30, bg-emerald-950/30, text-emerald-300)
Both use backdrop-blur-sm for the glass effect.

Prop: cartridgeContext ('knyt' | 'metame') on RuntimeTakeoverBanner, driven by runtimeContext state in MetaMeRuntimeClient. Priority chain: cartridgeContext → manifest.theme → DEFAULT_STYLE.

Thin-client shell compliance: any badge, pill, or indicator surfacing the active runtime lead must use the same colour tokens — amber for KNYT, emerald for metaMe. Do NOT use rose/coral for metaMe. Canonical source: components/metame/RuntimeTakeoverBanner.tsx CONTEXT_STYLES.
